standard: kỉ niệm tôi đưa bạn về xong tôi bị mắc bão lụt năm nào?

B: Watch this to learn how to make fish sauce, sister!
C: Go get some and bring them back to make fermented fish, okay sis?

B: Go out and see if it's my friend.
C: Let's go out and see if it's my friend.

A: Is there anything I can do to help you guys out?
B: Is there anything I can do so I can come over and help you all?
C: Is there anything I can do so that I can come over and help you guys?

standard: ơi chà, tôi cỡ này rồi à bạn.

B: Oh wow, I've reached this stage already, have I?

B: I've been waiting to go out in the rain, but I haven't seen anything from you yet.

B: Who said that? My head hurts, and my knees ache.

B: Fine, I'll just pretend to help and then tell my parents to split it.

B: If you're going to say something, say it clearly; otherwise, just don't, because some people understand while others don't.

A: That's right, they even fought over a bag of tea.
B: That's right, they fought over a bag of tea.
C: That's right, they also fought over a bag of tea

A: This person must be crazy. They should at least clearly state what the issue is when they post something.

B: Flowers will probably be expensive this year.
C: Flowers must be expensive this year

B: This girl seems hard to get married off, huh. I'll love you first.

B: I went to Gia Lai for fun, and just for reminding someone about the bike kickstand, I almost got beaten up.
